purpose: Track x401 semantics that atrib deliberately keeps as caller-owned verifier facts until Proof lands canonical upstream rules.

threads.title: Multi-endpoint Requests
threads.atrib_boundary: Represent each proof-gated endpoint as its own signed action and x401 evidence block in one context_id. Do not invent a combined request format before Proof defines endpoint id, audience, replay, and delegation rules.

threads.title: Agent-asserted origin for middleman handling
threads.atrib_boundary: Treat asserted origin as a caller-owned verifier outcome. Store only the verification status and safe hashes until Proof defines canonical origin fields.

threads.title: Non-Goals: add user interaction requirements
threads.external_engagement: none; prior atrib comment was deliberately deleted because the thread did not need another implementer note
threads.atrib_boundary: Do not infer user presence from x401. If a host needs human approval or consent, record it as separate action-gate or approval evidence and link it through informed_by.

threads.title: Agent Identifiers and proof/payment binding
threads.atrib_boundary: Keep proof identity and payment rails separate. Store agent_id and proofPaymentBindingVerified as verifier facts, while AP2, x402, MPP, ACP, UCP, and a2a-x402 remain transaction evidence.

threads.title: trqp_v2 trusted authorities
threads.atrib_boundary: Do not implement TRQP verification inside atrib yet. Map landed upstream authority fields into issuerTrustRootType and issuerTrustRootRef after Proof settles the trust-root model.
